query: Could you construct a week-long travel plan for me, beginning in Bakersfield and heading to Texas? This journey spans from March 2nd to March 8th, 2022, and I am aiming to explore 3 unique cities. I have set aside a budget of $6,100 for this trip.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Bakersfield to El Paso
plan.attraction: El Paso Zoo and Botanical Gardens; National Border Patrol Museum;
plan.dinner: Ceviche Tapas Bar & Restaurant, El Paso
plan.accommodation: Upper West / Morningside Heights Apt, Near Subway, El Paso

plan.attraction: Franklin Mountains State Park; El Paso Museum of Art;
plan.lunch: The Garden Cafe - The Fern, El Paso
plan.dinner: Downtown Kitchen & Bar - Courtyard by Marriott, El Paso
plan.accommodation: Upper West / Morningside Heights Apt, Near Subway, El Paso

plan.transportation: self-driving, from El Paso to Amarillo
plan.dinner: Kanha North & South Indian Veg., Amarillo
plan.accommodation: Gramercy Park restful, cozy, sun-filled home, Amarillo

plan.attraction: Texas Air & Space Museum; Amarillo Museum of Art;
plan.accommodation: Gramercy Park restful, cozy, sun-filled home, Amarillo

plan.transportation: Flight F3609463, from Amarillo to Dallas
plan.attraction: Dallas World Aquarium; Dallas Museum of Art;

plan.transportation: Flight F4048045, from Dallas to Bakersfield
